fa-tombstone.appearanceId: a rounded-top rectangular grave marker slab standing upright with a smooth face and flat base; upright headstone silhouette with a curved top and no inscription
fa-tombstone.functionalityId: represents a grave marker or cemetery headstone; indicates death, a burial site, or a Halloween or spooky theme
fa-tombstone.intentId: mark a gravesite or indicate a death-related or Halloween context; represent cemetery or memorial content in an application

fa-tombstone-alt.appearanceId: a rounded-top rectangular grave marker slab with carved horizontal lines suggesting an inscription on the face; headstone silhouette with text lines engraved on its surface
fa-tombstone-alt.functionalityId: represents an inscribed grave marker with epitaph lines; indicates a named burial site, memorial record, or Halloween theme
fa-tombstone-alt.intentId: mark a named gravesite or display a memorial inscription context; represent cemetery or death-related content with a personalized headstone

fa-toolbox.appearanceId: a rectangular box with a hinged lid and a horizontal carrying handle arching over the top center; flat-topped tool storage case outline with a center carry handle
fa-toolbox.functionalityId: represents a toolbox or collection of tools and utilities; opens or indicates a tools, utilities, or settings panel
fa-toolbox.intentId: access a set of tools or utilities in an application; open a toolbox or developer utilities menu

fa-tools.appearanceId: a wrench and a screwdriver crossed diagonally over each other forming an X shape; two hand tools crossed in a diagonal arrangement
fa-tools.functionalityId: represents maintenance, repair, or developer tools; opens or indicates a settings, configuration, or tools section
fa-tools.intentId: access maintenance or configuration tools in an application; indicate a repair, build, or developer tools context

fa-tooth.appearanceId: a molar tooth silhouette with a wide crown showing cusps at the top and two or three short roots extending downward from the base; organic tooth outline with bumped crown and forked roots
fa-tooth.functionalityId: represents a tooth or dental health topic; indicates dental care, dentist appointments, or oral hygiene
fa-tooth.intentId: access dental health information or schedule a dentist appointment; represent oral care or dentistry content in a health application

fa-toothbrush.appearanceId: an elongated handle with a small rectangular bristle head at one end, angled slightly; slim toothbrush outline with a narrow head and long straight grip handle
fa-toothbrush.functionalityId: represents oral hygiene or teeth brushing; indicates dental care routines or personal hygiene tracking
fa-toothbrush.intentId: track or promote oral hygiene habits; represent dental care or personal hygiene in a health or wellness application

fa-torah.appearanceId: two scroll rollers (atzei chayyim) connected by a rolled parchment, forming the classic Torah scroll shape with cylindrical handles at each end; paired wooden handle scrolls with wrapped parchment between them
fa-torah.functionalityId: represents the Jewish Torah scroll; indicates Jewish religious content, scripture, or spiritual study
fa-torah.intentId: access Jewish religious texts or indicate a Judaic spiritual context; represent Torah study or Jewish faith content in a religious application

fa-torii-gate.appearanceId: a traditional Japanese torii gate with two upright pillars, a straight lower crossbeam, and a curved upper crossbeam with slightly projecting ends (kasagi); two-pillar gate silhouette with a double crossbeam and curved cap lintel
fa-torii-gate.functionalityId: represents a Shinto shrine entrance or Japanese cultural landmark; indicates Japanese culture, spirituality, or a sacred site
fa-torii-gate.intentId: indicate a Shinto shrine or Japanese cultural or religious context; mark a sacred or cultural landmark in a travel or spiritual application

fa-tornado.appearanceId: a funnel-shaped vortex with wide curved swirling bands at the top tapering to a narrow point at the bottom; inverted cone of spiraling lines narrowing to a tip
fa-tornado.functionalityId: represents a tornado or severe rotating storm; indicates extreme weather alerts or tornado warnings
fa-tornado.intentId: display a tornado or severe storm warning; represent extreme weather conditions in a weather or emergency alert application

fa-tower-cell.appearanceId: a tall lattice mast with diagonal cross-bracing and a small antenna or signal dish mounted at the top; open-frame cell tower structure with an antenna at the apex
fa-tower-cell.functionalityId: represents a cellular network tower or mobile signal transmitter; indicates cellular coverage, network strength, or telecommunications infrastructure
fa-tower-cell.intentId: display mobile network coverage or signal strength; indicate cellular infrastructure or telecommunications in a network or map application

fa-tower-control.appearanceId: an airport control tower building with a tall vertical shaft topped by a glass-enclosed cab with a wide observation deck ring; vertical tower structure with a flared windowed cab at the top
fa-tower-control.functionalityId: represents an air traffic control tower; indicates airport operations, flight control, or aviation infrastructure
fa-tower-control.intentId: navigate to airport or air traffic control information; represent aviation operations or flight management in a travel or aviation application

fa-tower-observation.appearanceId: a tall slender tower with an open or enclosed viewing platform or deck near the top; narrow vertical tower structure with a protruding observation platform level
fa-tower-observation.functionalityId: represents an observation tower or lookout structure; indicates a scenic viewpoint, tourist attraction, or elevated observation point
fa-tower-observation.intentId: mark or navigate to an observation tower or scenic viewpoint; represent a tourist landmark or elevated lookout in a travel or map application

fa-tractor.appearanceId: a farm tractor silhouette with a large rear wheel, small front wheel, boxy engine hood, and a raised exhaust pipe; side-profile agricultural tractor with oversized drive wheel and cab
fa-tractor.functionalityId: represents agricultural machinery or farming equipment; indicates farm operations, agriculture, or land cultivation
fa-tractor.intentId: access farming or agricultural equipment content; represent farm operations or rural land management in an agriculture application

fa-trademark.appearanceId: the letters TM in superscript style, typically rendered as a small raised two-letter monogram; trademark symbol comprising a T and M in small caps or raised format
fa-trademark.functionalityId: represents a trademark designation or brand protection mark; indicates proprietary branding or intellectual property status
fa-trademark.intentId: denote a trademarked name or brand; indicate intellectual property rights or brand ownership in a legal or product context

fa-traffic-cone.appearanceId: a tall narrow cone shape with one or two horizontal reflective stripe bands near the base, sitting on a wide flat square base; orange cone silhouette with stripe bands and a broad flat foot
fa-traffic-cone.functionalityId: represents a road safety cone or construction zone marker; indicates road work, hazards, or traffic redirection
fa-traffic-cone.intentId: mark a hazard or construction zone; indicate road work or traffic redirection in a mapping or safety application

fa-traffic-light.appearanceId: a vertical rectangular signal housing with three circular lights stacked top to bottom, all unlit or neutral; upright three-light signal box outline with no illuminated lens
fa-traffic-light.functionalityId: represents a generic traffic signal or stoplight; indicates road traffic control, signal status, or intersection management
fa-traffic-light.intentId: display or manage traffic signal information; represent road signal control in a transportation or smart city application

fa-traffic-light-go.appearanceId: a vertical rectangular signal housing with three circular lights, the bottom green light illuminated and the top two dark; three-light signal box with the lower green lens lit
fa-traffic-light-go.functionalityId: represents a green go signal on a traffic light; indicates permission to proceed, an all-clear status, or a go condition
fa-traffic-light-go.intentId: signal a go or proceed condition; indicate an all-clear or approved status in a workflow or traffic management application

fa-traffic-light-slow.appearanceId: a vertical rectangular signal housing with three circular lights, the middle yellow light illuminated and the top and bottom dark; three-light signal box with the center yellow lens lit
fa-traffic-light-slow.functionalityId: represents a yellow caution signal on a traffic light; indicates a slow-down, warning, or transitional state
fa-traffic-light-slow.intentId: signal a caution or slow-down condition; indicate a warning or transitional status in a workflow or traffic management application

fa-traffic-light-stop.appearanceId: a vertical rectangular signal housing with three circular lights, the top red light illuminated and the bottom two dark; three-light signal box with the upper red lens lit
fa-traffic-light-stop.functionalityId: represents a red stop signal on a traffic light; indicates a halt, blocked, or stop condition
fa-traffic-light-stop.intentId: signal a stop or blocked condition; indicate a halt or forbidden status in a workflow or traffic management application

fa-trailer.appearanceId: a long rectangular cargo box on a wheeled axle with a fifth-wheel hitch coupler at the front end; flat-sided box trailer silhouette with wheels and a forward coupling hitch
fa-trailer.functionalityId: represents a cargo trailer or towed vehicle; indicates freight transport, hauling, or logistics
fa-trailer.intentId: manage cargo transport or logistics operations; represent freight hauling or trailer fleet management in a shipping application

fa-train.appearanceId: a side-profile locomotive or train car with a rounded front, wheels on a rail track, and a rectangular body; front-facing or side-view train engine silhouette on rails
fa-train.functionalityId: represents a train or railway transit vehicle; indicates rail transport, train schedules, or station navigation
fa-train.intentId: navigate train schedules or rail transit options; access railway transportation information in a travel or transit application

fa-train-track.appearanceId: two parallel horizontal rails connected by evenly spaced perpendicular railroad ties (sleepers), viewed from above or slightly angled; parallel rail lines with crossties between them
fa-train-track.functionalityId: represents railway tracks or a train route path; indicates a rail line, train route, or railway infrastructure
fa-train-track.intentId: display a railway route or track layout; represent rail infrastructure in a mapping or transportation application

fa-train-tram.appearanceId: a boxy flat-fronted tram or streetcar silhouette with a pantograph arm extending upward from the roof and wheels on rails; compact tram car with an overhead pantograph collector
fa-train-tram.functionalityId: represents an urban tram or streetcar; indicates tram routes, light rail transit, or urban public transport
fa-train-tram.intentId: navigate tram or streetcar routes in a city; access urban light rail transit information in a transit or map application

fa-train-tunnel.appearanceId: a rounded arched tunnel portal with a train silhouette or rail tracks visible inside the opening; curved arch tunnel mouth framing a rail passage inside
fa-train-tunnel.functionalityId: represents a railway tunnel or underground rail passage; indicates a train tunnel, underground route, or metro passage
fa-train-tunnel.intentId: indicate a railway tunnel on a route map; represent underground or tunnel rail infrastructure in a transportation application

fa-tram.appearanceId: a cable car or aerial tram gondola silhouette hanging from an overhead cable line with a rectangular cabin body and suspension bracket at the top; hanging tram cabin with a cable attachment at the roof
fa-tram.functionalityId: represents a cable car or aerial tramway gondola; indicates mountain tram, ski lift, or aerial ropeway transit
fa-tram.intentId: navigate aerial tram or cable car routes; access mountain transit or ski resort lift information in a travel or map application

fa-transformer-bolt.appearanceId: a cylindrical drum or barrel shape representing an electrical transformer with a lightning bolt overlaid or adjacent; round transformer cylinder with a superimposed lightning bolt symbol
fa-transformer-bolt.functionalityId: represents an electrical transformer or power conversion device; indicates high-voltage power distribution or electrical infrastructure
fa-transformer-bolt.intentId: indicate an electrical transformer location or power infrastructure; represent high-voltage or power conversion in a utility or engineering application

fa-transgender.appearanceId: a circle with a combined arrow pointing upward-right (male), a cross pointing downward (female), and an additional diagonal upward-left arrow; gender symbol circle with three directional arrows representing all three gender directions
fa-transgender.functionalityId: represents the transgender gender identity symbol; indicates transgender identity, gender diversity, or inclusivity
fa-transgender.intentId: represent transgender identity or gender diversity; indicate inclusivity and LGBTQ+ identity options in a profile or settings interface

fa-transporter.appearanceId: a circular teleportation beam device with a human figure standing on a central platform surrounded by a glowing energy ring or beam column; round transporter pad with a person silhouette inside an energy beam
fa-transporter.functionalityId: represents a science-fiction teleportation device; indicates teleportation, fast travel, or instant movement in a game or sci-fi interface
fa-transporter.intentId: trigger a teleport or fast travel action; represent sci-fi transportation or instant movement in a game or futuristic application

fa-transporter-1.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and one energy arc or ring surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and a single energy ring
fa-transporter-1.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level one with one energy ring; indicates the first stage or lowest power teleportation state
fa-transporter-1.intentId: indicate a first-level teleport activation; represent a minimal-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-2.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and two energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and two concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-2.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level two with two energy rings; indicates the second stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-2.intentId: indicate a second-level teleport activation; represent a mid-low-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-3.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and three energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and three concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-3.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level three with three energy rings; indicates the third stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-3.intentId: indicate a third-level teleport activation; represent a medium-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-4.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and four energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and four concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-4.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level four with four energy rings; indicates the fourth stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-4.intentId: indicate a fourth-level teleport activation; represent an elevated-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-5.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and five energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and five concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-5.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level five with five energy rings; indicates the fifth stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-5.intentId: indicate a fifth-level teleport activation; represent a high-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-6.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and six energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and six concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-6.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at activation level six with six energy rings; indicates the sixth stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-6.intentId: indicate a sixth-level teleport activation; represent a very high-energy transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-7.appearanceId: a beam platform with a human figure and seven energy arcs or rings surrounding the platform; transporter pad with a person silhouette and seven concentric energy rings
fa-transporter-7.functionalityId: represents a teleportation device at full activation with seven energy rings; indicates the maximum stage teleportation state
fa-transporter-7.intentId: indicate a maximum-level teleport activation; represent a fully powered transporter state in a sci-fi game or application

fa-transporter-empty.appearanceId: an empty beam platform with no human figure, showing only the circular pad and surrounding energy ring or beam column; transporter pad outline with an energy ring and no person silhouette
fa-transporter-empty.functionalityId: represents an unoccupied teleportation platform; indicates an empty or ready-to-use transporter pad with no occupant
fa-transporter-empty.intentId: indicate an available or unoccupied transporter pad; represent a ready teleportation station in a sci-fi game or application

fa-trash.appearanceId: a cylindrical waste bin with a flat lid on top and a narrow rim or lip; upright trash can silhouette with a flat-top lid
fa-trash.functionalityId: deletes or moves an item to the trash; indicates a delete or discard action for files or content
fa-trash.intentId: delete or discard an item permanently; remove unwanted files or content in an application

fa-trash-alt.appearanceId: a cylindrical waste bin with a separate flat lid displayed slightly above the open container top, suggesting a removable lid; trash can body with a detached hovering lid above it
fa-trash-alt.functionalityId: deletes or moves an item to trash using an alternate removable-lid style; indicates a delete or discard action as an alternative trash style
fa-trash-alt.intentId: delete or discard an item using the alternate trash style; remove content or files with a variant trash representation

fa-trash-alt-slash.appearanceId: a cylindrical waste bin with a detached lid and a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire symbol; trash can with hovering lid and a strikethrough diagonal line
fa-trash-alt-slash.functionalityId: represents a disabled, excluded, or no-delete state using the alt trash style; indicates that deletion is blocked or an item is excluded from trash
fa-trash-alt-slash.intentId: prevent deletion or indicate a no-discard restriction; show that an item cannot be or has not been trashed

fa-trash-can-check.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with a checkmark badge overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with a check symbol
fa-trash-can-check.functionalityId: confirms a successful deletion or marks an item as cleared from trash; indicates a verified or completed discard action
fa-trash-can-check.intentId: confirm that an item has been successfully deleted or cleared; indicate a completed discard or verified deletion in an application

fa-trash-can-clock.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with a clock face badge overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with a clock symbol
fa-trash-can-clock.functionalityId: represents a scheduled or timed deletion; indicates that an item is queued for automatic deletion at a future time
fa-trash-can-clock.intentId: schedule an item for automatic deletion at a specified time; manage timed or deferred discard actions in an application

fa-trash-can-list.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with small horizontal lines suggesting a list overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with list lines
fa-trash-can-list.functionalityId: represents a list of trashed or deleted items; opens or displays the contents of the trash or deletion queue
fa-trash-can-list.intentId: view or manage a list of deleted items; access the trash contents or deletion history in an application

fa-trash-can-plus.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with a plus sign badge overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with a plus symbol
fa-trash-can-plus.functionalityId: adds an item to the trash or creates a new trash collection; indicates an add-to-trash or new discard action
fa-trash-can-plus.intentId: add an item to the trash or create a new deletion entry; manage additions to a trash or recycle bin in an application

fa-trash-can-undo.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with a curved undo arrow badge overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with a backward-curving arrow
fa-trash-can-undo.functionalityId: restores or recovers an item from the trash; indicates an undo-delete or restore-from-trash action
fa-trash-can-undo.intentId: recover or restore a deleted item from the trash; undo a discard action in an application

fa-trash-can-xmark.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can body with an X mark badge overlaid on or near the container; waste bin silhouette with a cross or X symbol
fa-trash-can-xmark.functionalityId: permanently empties or dismisses items from the trash; indicates a permanent delete or cancel-from-trash action
fa-trash-can-xmark.intentId: permanently delete or dismiss items from the trash; confirm a permanent removal or empty-trash action in an application

fa-trash-check.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can with a flat lid and a checkmark badge overlaid on or near the container; upright trash bin with a check symbol and flat-top lid
fa-trash-check.functionalityId: confirms a successful deletion using the standard lid style; indicates a verified or completed discard action
fa-trash-check.intentId: confirm that an item has been successfully deleted; indicate a verified deletion or completed discard with the standard trash style

fa-trash-clock.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can with a flat lid and a clock face badge overlaid on or near the container; upright trash bin with a clock symbol and flat-top lid
fa-trash-clock.functionalityId: represents a scheduled or timed deletion using the standard lid style; indicates an item queued for automatic deletion
fa-trash-clock.intentId: schedule automatic deletion of an item at a future time; manage deferred discard actions using the standard trash in an application

fa-trash-list.appearanceId: a cylindrical trash can with a flat lid and small horizontal list lines overlaid on or near the container; upright trash bin with list lines and flat-top lid
fa-trash-list.functionalityId: displays a list of trashed items using the standard lid style; opens or indicates the contents or deletion queue of the trash
fa-trash-list.intentId: view or manage deleted items in the standard trash; access the trash contents or deletion history with the standard trash style
